name: Filled Duotone
desc: Rounded, friendly filled icons: a solid primary shape plus a lighter accent (fill-opacity 0.35) picking out a secondary part or detail. One color, two tones — themes cleanly on dark or light.

name: MTB Part Silhouette
desc: Detailed, realistic solid silhouettes of the actual parts, drawn to be product-accurate — a fork reads as a suspension fork, the shock as an air/coil shock, the tire as knobby tread, with negative-space cuts (bolt holes, vents, cable ports) for real detail.
